what_to_do: Install the canonical sf-start skill from this repo into the personal Codex skills folder.
why: The repo copy is canonical, but a personal Codex install makes the skill auto-discoverable in future sessions.
before_you_start: Confirm skills\sf-start\SKILL.md exists in the repo.
Confirm you want a personal Codex install at C:\Users\kryst\.codex\skills\sf-start.
exact_steps: Copy the repo skill folder into your personal Codex skills folder.
Confirm the copied folder contains SKILL.md and agents\openai.yaml.
Restart or refresh Codex if the skill does not appear.
exact_commands: Run from C:\Users\kryst\Code\Software Factory: Copy-Item -Recurse -Force -LiteralPath .\skills\sf-start -Destination C:\Users\kryst\.codex\skills\
how_to_verify: Verified on 2026-06-22: C:\Users\kryst\.codex\skills\sf-start exists and contains SKILL.md plus agents\. Start a new Codex session and ask to use $sf-start to start a new Software Factory project.
if_something_goes_wrong: Delete C:\Users\kryst\.codex\skills\sf-start, then repeat the copy from the repo source after confirming the repo skill validates.
what_to_tell_agent: Tell Codex whether the skill was installed successfully, deferred, or if you want Codex to do the copy with explicit approval.
